full_text:
Zu Bi 祖弼
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zu Bi (祖弼). Keeper of the Imperial Seal under Emperor Xian. Executed before Xian was deposed. Zu Bi is a fictional character. Zu Bi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zu Bi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:80
BiographySanguo Yanyi
Zu Bi was the Keeper of the Imperial Seal for the Han. When Cao Hong, Hua Xin and other officials demanded that Emperor Xian abdicate to Cao Pi, he was present. When Cao Hong demanded that Bi give them the Imperial Seal, he refused to present it, and Cao Hong ordered him removed and executed, his protests unceasing until the moment of his death.
